text:
for all disciplines (summed across the six disciplines of care). 

If the imputed cost for the 30-day period is greater than the sum of the case-mix and 
wage-adjusted 30-day period payment plus the fixed dollar loss amount (the outlier 
threshold), a set percentage (the loss sharing ratio) of the difference between the imputed 
amount and outlier threshold will be paid to the HHA as a wage-adjusted outlier payment 
in addition to the 30-day period payment. 

The amount of the outlier payment
